name: Nora Valkyrie: Locked in, not down
description:
3rd installment of the lockdown saga, (thanks for the feedback,)

pretty simple premise, flatten the curb by chilling at home, together we can beat Grimm-pox

only this time... Nora might be in your walls

this art is also in your walls, dont look behind you... https://au.pinterest.com/pin/45669383706070732/
creator: jimmy beast
